title: Tangerine Maxine Desk Friend PREORDER
description:
In many cultures, goldfish represent good luck and abundance, and those are all things I hoped to bring to you, through Maxine 🥹

Desk friends make perfect study buddies and house plant guardians! They're a good weight to hold for anxiousness, too.

Hand sculpted with polymer clay and varnished with UV resin for shine and durability. 

NOTE: This item is made to order, estimated to ship in 1-2 months from the date of purchase. Thank you <3! 

Each item is made with the highest attention to quality and care; however, due to the nature of handmade items, gentle use is recommended.

title: Fall Into Winter Coloring Book
description:
Volume 2 of Uncomfy World welcomes us into the coziest seasons of all 🍂☕ This book features 24 hand-drawn illustrations themed around autumn and winter, and now with perforated pages, it is made to be torn out and shared with friends and family! This book is a love letter to the world I’ve built over the years through clay, and I hope it brings you comfort during busy, uncomfy seasons of your life. 

Product details:

  • 10" wide × 8" tall (perfect for curling up on the couch with!)

  • 24 cozy coloring pages (12 Fall themed, 12 winter themed) + an illustrated checklist + welcome page

  • Perforated pages (perfect for creating your own little art prints!)

  • 85gsm paper—medium weight and satisfying to color on ✿ (would recommend putting a piece of scratch paper behind, though, as inky markers may bleed through!)

title: Strawberry Maxine Heatable Plush
description:
Your favorite goldfish is back, and cozier than ever.

Strawberry Maxine was one of the very first original characters I created for my shop: a little goldfish with big dreams and an even bigger heart. I designed her for fellow anxious souls like me, and over the past 6 months, she’s become my go-to comfort during stressful days, late nights overthinking, and those moments when I just needed a little extra support. She’s a warm hug, a loyal desk buddy, and a gentle reminder that you’re not alone.

Now, Maxine has a hidden zipper pouch with a removable, microwavable, and lightly weighted heat pad—perfect for soothing cramps, easing anxiety, and offering that much-needed comfort when you need it most.

I hope Maxine brings you the same calm and luck she’s brought me. 💛

Details:
🐟 Approx. 13" in length
🐟 Fabric: Ultra-soft Minky plush
🐟 Heat pack: Filled with tourmaline stone, outer pouch is 100% cotton
🐟 Care: Remove heat pack before microwaving. Heat for 30 seconds and enjoy the warmth!

title: Strawberry Cozy Bundle
description:
The Strawberry Cozy Bundle brings together two comfort essentials: the ultra-soft Strawberry Maxine Plush and the Fall Into Winter Coloring Book. Maxine includes a hidden zipper pouch with a removable, microwavable heat pad for warm, soothing support whenever you need it. The coloring book adds 24 hand-drawn autumn and winter scenes with perforated pages for sharing your creations.

Curl up, get cozy, and enjoy a little comfort from Uncomfy World.

Bundle includes:
• Strawberry Maxine Plush (approx. 13", ultra-soft minky, microwavable weighted heat pad)
• Fall Into Winter Coloring Book (10" × 8", 24 illustrations, perforated pages)

title: Uncomfy & Friends Coloring Book
description:
A cozy little escape into uncomfy world ♡ Inside, you’ll find 24 hand-drawn illustrations featuring the beloved characters from Uncomfy World: Maxine the Goldfish, Coffeebara, Mr. Duggy, Babushka Bunny, and so many more. Each page tells a gentle story: pottery afternoons, quiet moments arranging flowers, sweet baking days, cozy reading nooks, silly dance breaks, and even underwater adventures.

This book is a love letter to the world I’ve built over the years through clay, now reimagined in illustrated form.  It’s a soft, creative space to unwind, reconnect, and bring our whimsical world to life with your own colors.

Product details:

  • 10" wide × 8" tall (perfect for curling up on the couch with!)

  • 24 cozy coloring pages + an illustrated index & thank you page

  • 85gsm paper ✿ satisfying to color on but would still recommend a piece of scratch paper behind as inky markers may bleed through!

title: Book Bundle
description:
This special bundle brings together both Uncomfy World coloring books so you can escape into soft little stories all year long. Between the two volumes, you’ll find 48 hand-drawn illustrations featuring all your favorite characters — Maxine the Goldfish, Coffeebara, Mr. Duggy, Babushka Bunny, and so many more — each page inviting you into a quiet moment of creativity.

Uncomfy & Friends takes you through gentle everyday scenes: pottery afternoons, flower arranging, sweet baking days, cozy reading nooks, silly dance breaks, and underwater adventures. Fall into Winter brings the coldest seasons to life with fall and winter themes, plus perforated pages so you can tear out and share your creations with friends and family.

Whether you’re coloring through sunlight or snow days, this duo is a soft space to unwind, reconnect, and bring the whimsical world of Uncomfy to life with your own colors.

Bundle details:
• Two 10" × 8" soft-touch coloring books
• 48 total cozy illustrations
• Autumn, winter, and everyday cozy scenes
• Perforated pages in Volume 2
• 85gsm paper ✿ (I still recommend placing a sheet behind your page when using inky markers)

title: November Pages ✿ Print at Home!
description:
Two digital-download coloring pages from Uncomfy World, inspired by the quiet, cozy moments November brings. These come from the Fall Into Winter Coloring Book and are filled with so much cuteness and coziness... I just know they’re going to make your November feel warm and special! ✨🐻

This set includes 2 original coloring pages you can print at home or color digitally, whatever feels best. Your files will be ready to download immediately after checkout on the confirmation page, and you’ll also get an email with a link so you can return to them anytime. The final files come without watermarks, promise. 💛

title: Digital Downloads ✿ Summer Pages
description:
Four little windows into Uncomfy World—originally from the Uncomfy & Friends coloring book, now available as digital downloads 💫

This set includes four original illustrations you can print at home or color on your tablet, whatever feels best. Each page is filled with soft details, silly friends, and the kind of calm moments that make Uncomfy World feel like home.

Your files will be ready to download as soon as you check out, and you’ll also get an email with a download link so you can come back to them anytime. No watermarks on the final files, promise 💌

I hope these pages make your day a little lighter and a lot more fun. Thanks for being part of this little world with me 🌱
